nasb.text: For Joshua did not withdraw his hand with which he stretched out the javelin until he had utterly destroyed all the inhabitants of Ai.

esv.text: But Joshua did not draw back his hand with which he stretched out the javelin until he had devoted all the inhabitants of Ai to destruction.

cnv.text: 約書亞沒有收回伸出短槍的手，直到把艾城的居民都消滅為止。

ccb.text: 一直到艾城所有的人都被杀光了，约书亚才收回手中的矛。
